headline: Oracle-only state: feeds live, all operational layers cold
summary: The swarm is in a pre-activation phase with price feeds flowing but zero activity across worker, commerce, and intake. AERO leads the downside at -3.7% while ETH and USDC hold flat. GitHub commits continue on site infrastructure, but no agent-commerce cycles have executed.
sections: Oracle: ETH $1,993.41 (-0.15%), AERO $0.398 (-3.73%), USDC $0.9995 (-0.02%). AERO showing notable relative weakness; stablecoin peg holding.
Worker: Fully dormant — no cycles recorded, no channels active, zero actions executed. No last_cycle_at timestamp indicates the worker has never completed a run.
Commerce & Intake: Zero providers, zero bazaar listings, zero monitor events, zero intake packs. x402 payment rails and marketplace have no inventory or participants yet.
GitHub: Repo active with 3 recent commits (SEO/sitemap/pulse board), 2 open issues. Last push 4 min before snapshot — dev velocity on site layer, not agent operations.

signals.label: Worker never cycled
signals.detail: last_cycle_at is null — worker has not executed a single cycle since deployment

signals.label: Commerce empty
signals.detail: 0 providers, 0 bazaar listings, 0 monitor events — x402 marketplace has no supply side

signals.label: Intake empty
signals.detail: 0 packs queued — no demand entering the pipeline

signals.label: AERO -3.7% 24h
signals.detail: Largest price mover in feed; may affect Aerodrome-linked LP or fee assumptions if commerce activates

signals.label: USDC peg stable
signals.detail: $0.9995 with -0.018% drift — payment rail integrity intact for x402 settlement

disclaimer: Automated operational pulse from swarm feeds — not financial advice. Data freshness depends on factory cycle interval.

marketing_campaign.hook: Base USDC x402: Agent Micropayments, Zero Friction
marketing_campaign.body_short: Your agents need to pay for API calls — USDC exact-scheme micropayments on Base make it happen automatically. Connect via MCP + x402 in under 5 minutes and start transacting. → https://api.agentic-swarm-marketplace.com/x402/v1/query
marketing_campaign.body_long: Coinbase CDP Bazaar-listed facilitator, now live on Base mainnet. The **Base · USDC · x402** rails deliver exact-scheme micropayments purpose-built for agent-to-agent commerce — contract triage, audits, and data queries on eip155:8453, all settled in USDC. Connect your agents via MCP + x402 in under 5 minutes with no manual key management. The marketplace is fresh and waiting for first movers to list and query. Start now → https://api.agentic-swarm-marketplace.com/x402/v1/query
